title: The VALIS Trilogy — Page 258
raw_text:
procrastination and from the evil that has descended on it. Awaken the
Procurator’s soul to the urgency of this our hour of ordeal.
We are being spiritually tested, he prayed. I know that is the case. We must
prove our worth by casting out this satanic presence. Make us worthy, Lord;
lend us thy sword of might. Give us thy saddle of righteousness to mount the
steed of . . . He could not finish the thought; it was too intense. Hasten to our
aid, he finished, and raised his head. A sense of triumph filled him; as if, he
thought, we have trapped something to be killed. We have hunted it down.
And it will die. Praise be to God!
